description: Design a 100+ panel ground-mounted solar array for an agricultural site in Sacramento, CA (approximate latitude 38.5°). The goal is to optimize the tilt angle to maximize energy yield specifically for the summer irrigation season (June - August). Start with the empty Energy3D scene. Set the location to Sacramento, CA. Draw a Foundation, place a Solar Panel Array on it with at least 100 panels, and use the Monthly Yield Analysis tool to find the optimum tilt angle for summer generation (ignoring annual/winter performance). Set the panels to this optimal summer tilt angle. Save the project to ~/Documents/Energy3D/summer_irrigation_array.ng3. Finally, create a text file at ~/Documents/Energy3D/optimization_report.txt containing your chosen tilt angle and a 1-sentence justification.
